description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed kitchen knife with a dark wooden handle and a visible bolster where the blade meets the handle. The blade is metallic, slightly reflective, and appears to have a fine edge suitable for slicing. The handle is ergonomically contoured, made from a dark wood with a smooth finish, and features a subtle grain pattern. Accompanying the knife is a black plastic sheath with a molded form to fit the blade and a visible logo or emblem on its surface. The sheath has a matte finish and appears to be designed for safe storage and transport of the knife. The overall design suggests a high-quality kitchen tool intended for precise cutting tasks.
description: A long, straight-edged kitchen knife with a dark wooden ergonomic handle and a matching black plastic sheath, both featuring smooth finishes and subtle detailing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, the contoured wooden handle, and the black sheath with a visible logo.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thickness of the blade and handle, as well as the molded contours of the sheath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the back of the handle, the full blade, and the sheath's length and attachment features.
description_view_3: Blade tip and handle end view, emphasizing the ergonomic curve of the handle and the sheath's profile.
attribute_handle_design: contoured dark wood, smooth ergonomic grip, subtle grain, no visible texture
